plan_metadata.name: group  validation contoso OpenAI Python In Copilot

steps.description: Click the "Message Copilot" input field within the M365 Copilot chat interface.
Type text 'Compare Contoso Electronics plan' into the 'Message Copilot' input field located within the chat interface of the M365 Copilot application under the 'vscuse_app_RmUvQlocal' agent.
Press the "Enter" key to submit the chat input containing the text "Compare Contoso Electronics plans" in the M365 Copilot interface.
Click the red "Close" button at the top-right corner of the browser tab labeled "vscuse_app_RmUvQlocal."
Click the "Yes" button in the Pylance notification to enable type checking recommendations in Visual Studio Code.
Activate the "Find" functionality in the Visual Studio Code editor using the keyboard shortcut: Ctrl+F.
Type text 'Error code: 401' into the active terminal in the Debug Console pane of Visual Studio Code, interacting in the context of debugging Python code.
Press the Enter key to confirm the "Yes" button in the Pylance notification within the Visual Studio Code interface.
Press the F1 key to open the command palette in Visual Studio Code, currently focused on the "Debug" tab with active Python debugging session.
Type text: 'Notifications: clear all notification' in the Visual Studio Code Command Palette to interact with the "Notifications: Clear All Notifications" command.
Press the 'Enter' key to execute the "Notifications: Clear All Notifications" command in Visual Studio Code's Command Palette.
@assertion "Error code: 401 - {'error': {'message': 'Incorrect API key provided" is visible in the terminal
